raw_text:
📍AltLayer Phase III - Restaking and Flash Layer

Tutorials👇

Step 1: Retake at EigenLayer testnet (min 0.01 rETH or stETH)
- Access: https://testnet.rocketpool.net/
- Connect Metamask wallet (Goërli Test)
- Stake ETH to get rETH
- Go to Metamask wallet
- Transfer goETH to the wallet below to receive stETH
- Access: https://goerli.eigenlayer.xyz/
- Connect Metamask wallet (Goërli Test)
- Enter 1 of 2 pools "Rocket Pool Ether" & "Lido Staked Ether"
- Make a Min Deposit 0.01 $rETH or $stETH

Step 2: Create a restaking tier Flash Layer
- Access: https://altitude.altlayer.io/
- Select "Launch App"
- Connect Metamask wallet (Goërli Test)
- Select "Create" (Left column) "Restakeing Trial" "Confirm" "Proceed"
- Scroll down and select "Validate address ownership"
- Sign on the wallet and select "Create"
- Wait for the display from "Depoying" to "Active"
- Select the 3 dots and select Share
- Done

🏃‍♂️ Claim points: click here

⚡️ Wallet to transfer goETH to receive stETH:
0x1643E812aE58766192Cf7D2Cf9567dF2C37e9B7F

raw_text:
📍 Public Goods Network testnet

✅ Tutorials:

- Sepolia network ETH Faucet: https://sepoliafaucet.com/
- Add below PGN network parameters to Metamask wallet
- Access: https://pgn-bridge.vercel.app/bridge
- Connect Metamask wallet (Sepolia Network)
- Deposit ETH from Sepolia to Public Goods Network
- Asset item (first line) select TestToken
- Select "Mint 10 TestToken"
- Wait for a moment and you will see the token in your wallet (10 TOK)
- Transfer TOK from Sepolia to Public Goods Network
- Implement Bridge in reverse
- Done

🟪 PGN Network Specifications [Details]:
- Network: Sepolia PGN
- RPC: https://sepolia.publicgoods.network
- Chain ID: 58008
- Gas Token / Currency Symbol: ETH
- Block Explorer: https://explorer.sepolia.publicgoods.network/

✨ Public Goods Network is layer2 built on OP Stack developed by Gitcoin

#Testnet #PublicGoodsNetwork

raw_text:
📍 Debank Airdrops (Validable User Rabby Badge required)

Step 1: Go to rabby.io => Select Download for Chrome

Step 2: Enter the Private Key or 12 characters of the Debank connected wallet into Rabby

Step 3: On Rabby wallet, click on More option => Claim Rabby Badge => Learn more on Debank

Then select Mint => Get Claim Code => Save that code

Step 4: Re-access Rabby Wallet

Click on swap => Select the token to swap and do the swap

🚨 Note: Remember to open Enable Exchanges and select Ignore warning.

Step 5: On Rabby wallet:

On Rabby wallet, click Add => Request Rabby Badge then paste the code copied in step 3 and make the Request and you're done!

If you have money, you can hug Debank Web3 ID for $ 96 to use the Debank stream, maybe this is one of the criteria to receive an Airdrop later.

📍How to hunt Gems on Mainnet opBNB system

In general, the same fomo as the Base system, the potential tokens that come with the rug pool scams are similarly crowded. 

If you allocate capital into multiple tokens, don't get fomo and be greedy. Maybe we can get hidden gems like $BALD, $LEET, $RCKT on Base.

✅Tutorials:

Step 1: Load BNB into your wallet -> Bridge via #opBNB using the following link: https://opbnb-bridge.bnbchain.org/deposit

or https://www.orbiter.finance/?source=BNB%20Chain&dest=OpBNB

Step 2: Add the network #opBNB on Metamask manually

Network Name: opBNB
RPC URL: https://opbnb-mainnet-rpc.bnbchain.org/
Chain ID: 204
Symbol: BNB

-> Done and start hunting GEMs ✨

Good luck guys 😎

raw_text:
📍 Trading Knowledge #1 - Basic Candlestick Charts

1. Candlestick Components (Pic 1)

Daily candlesticks show open, high, low, and close prices, using colors (black for lower, white/green for higher) to indicate price range.

2. Candlestick vs. Bar Charts (Pic 2)

Candlesticks depict open-to-close ranges and highs/lows with real bodies and shadows, enhancing trend analysis over bar charts.

3. Bearish Engulfing Pattern (Pic 3)

Occurs when a red body engulfs a smaller green one in an uptrend, signaling potential decline.

4. Bearish Evening Star (Pic 4)

Last candle opens below the previous small body, closing deep within it, indicating buyer-to-seller shift.

5. Bullish Rising Three (Pic 5)

Starts with a white day, followed by smaller bodies within its range, ending with another white day.

6. Bearish Falling Three (Pic 6)

Begins with a large downward day, followed by smaller upward moves, closing with a significant downward move, indicating potential price drop.

✨ Lamas Finance $LMF

Last time, I missed the Solana wave, but after some time, I decided to shift my focus to this ecosystem. Solana currently gives me the same vibe as the early days of BSC.

Recalling the past, investors frequently pursued MVB-participating projects, such as the notable winner of the Solana Ignition Hackathon, StepN $GMT, which showcased substantial potential.

Applying a similar strategy to Solana this season, I am exploring projects that received awards in the Solana Hackathon for potential investment. These projects typically take their time to release tokens, but once they do, FOMO can be substantial.

One recent example is $FLUXB - the Top 1 project in the Solana Hyperdrive Hackathon, which has multiplied by 20 since listing.

While scrolling through Twitter, I stumbled upon this gem: Lamas Finance - the winner of the Solana Coding Camp in the Gamefi category, Link.

It fulfills all the criteria I've set, yet its current market cap is only $80k, making it worth considering.

Last time, I missed the Solana wave, but after some time, I decided to shift my focus to this ecosystem. Solana currently gives me the same vibe as the early days of BSC.

Recalling the past, investors frequently pursued MVB-participating projects, such as the notable winner of the Solana Ignition Hackathon, StepN $GMT, which showcased substantial potential.

Applying a similar strategy to Solana this season, I am exploring projects that received awards in the Solana Hackathon for potential investment. These projects typically take their time to release tokens, but once they do, FOMO can be substantial.

One recent example is $FLUXB - the Top 1 project in the Solana Hyperdrive Hackathon, which has multiplied by 20 since listing.

While scrolling through Twitter, I stumbled upon this gem: Lamas Finance - the winner of the Solana Coding Camp in the Gamefi category, Link.

It fulfills all the criteria I've set, yet its current market cap is only $80k, making it worth considering.

The potential reason behind the flash dump yesterday 👇

The current market features 2 main player groups: one holding substantial amounts of Altcoins, and another accumulating USDT while waiting for attractive entry points to invest in Altcoins.

BTC is anticipated to break the 48k resistance zone soon, testing traders' patience.

The increasing USDT/fiat exchange rate and high USDT lending APY suggest borrowers are leveraging their Altcoins for USDT.

This benefits USDT holders with APYs exceeding 20%, but poses a risk if most margin traders profit, leading to potential exchange losses and collapses.

Exchanges may manipulate prices to quickly generate significant profits, paying high interest rates to lenders, thus preventing potential collapse.

raw_text:
Summary of the FED's decisions in Q3/2024 👇

The FED maintains the interest rate range of 5.25% - 5.5%, the 5th consecutive hold since the September meeting.

The FED still expects 3 interest rate cuts in 2024, each by 0.25%, bringing the rate to around 4.6% by the end of the year.

The FED now only expects 3 interest rate cuts in 2025, down by 1 compared to the previous meeting, implying a rate of around 3.9% in 2025 instead of 3.6%.

It is anticipated that there will be an additional 3 rate cuts in 2026 and then 2 final cuts at an appropriate time to bring the long-term rate down to 2.6%.

The core PCE inflation forecast for 2024 is projected to increase to 2.6%, compared to 2.4% from the end of 2023 - indicating heightened concerns about inflation.

The FED stated that inflation "has cooled but remains elevated" and will not cut interest rates until inflation reaches 2%.

The FED raised the GDP growth forecast to +2.1% from 1.4% in the previous meeting. Soft landing prospects?

In summary, the FED maintains the interest rate and still expects to cut it 3 times in 2024, not just twice as feared. The soft landing is forecasted, indicating no recession despite lingering inflation concerns. The market appears to breathe a sigh of relief.

With the same interested rate 5.25% - 5.5% decision - the 5th time in a row from FED, this good news has made a huge impact for the crypto space. 

After the news, the whole market reacted positive and the green vibe is back to the base 🔼🔼⬆️⬆️

- CPI M/M 0.4% (Forecast = 0.3%, old month = 0.4%)

❗️ Reuters suggest that the SEC is expected to reject Ethereum Spot ETFs in May

- Meetings between issuers and the SEC have been one-sided, reminiscent of the cautious approach seen with Bitcoin ETF approvals.
- The approval of the Bitcoin ETF largely relied on Grayscale winning a lawsuit against the SEC. A similar legal development may be needed for an Ethereum ETF approval.
- The SEC may want more time to observe performance, especially given the recent listing of Ethereum Futures ETFs in late 2023, before considering a Spot ETF.

As a result, there is widespread anticipation that the SEC will turn down Ethereum Spot ETFs in May, potentially requiring funds to resubmit their applications.

ETH dumps after the news

📍 Update for BTC from Wyckoff's perspective

- Today I will update you on the BTC status from my Wyckoff perspective.

- I rarely apply Wyckoff to crypto because most of it does not create perfect models, this time is the same, however most wave structures largely respect the models with a rate of more than 70%. works correctly (applies to Wyckoff) you can backtest yourself with the 2021 and 2023 Season Altcoins Waves

- Okay, I will present the current situation of BTC from this perspective

- Currently we are in Phase E, where buyers expect that today's candle will be a reversal candle and they will get the best entry point of this pattern (Spring Point)

- This is also where Sellers, when they see a break out of the box model I drew in orange, will initiate Short positions.

- The point here is, we have seen BTC grow continuously for 6 months from November 2023 to April 2024 (monthly candles)
Therefore, I think that BTC should stop for a moment, and the above model is the distribution model, BTC should have this adjustment rhythm to be able to continue to grow more sustainably.

- Also, did you realize that when BTC reached the 73000 area, there was a lot of good news like the ETF being approved and a series of other news, BTC had many days with very large volume and funds bought a lot, but the price again sideway?
- Why?

- Up to now, BTC has broken out of the box model with larger volume than previous days and showed a strong breakout out of the box. Combining the above factors, I think this is probably a Wyckoff Distribution model.

This is just a personal perspective, you can verify or criticize yourself below this article, all opinions and analyzes will be respected!

#Insight

The market is in a sideways phase, so today I want to share a little about my perspective on the market compared to 2021.
- From the beginning of 2024 to the present, we have seen many new projects born in the Bullish state of the entire market
- Projects that have built products and raised capital since 2022-2023 have almost all issued tokens and listed on major exchanges.
- In the first 4 months of 2024, Binance has also listed many projects as Launchpool. Compared to 2021, the number of projects is more. Will Binance still appreciate projects when putting them in Launchpool like 2021?

- Most Launchpool projects at the present time after Listing are under great selling pressure from Airdrops, from projects... so price increases seem to be unfeasible for most new coins.

So do you think the 2024-2025 uptrend season will be more difficult to hold than 2021?

In the next article, I will analyze trends that may create waves in 2024

raw_text:
In the ETH ecosystem, there are some of the biggest sectors and projects:

1. Layer2
Main projects: $ARB, $OP, $STRK, $METIS, $MANTA

- $ARB has the highest TVL and largest number of Dapps among all projects. However, arb's price pump is relatively weak and has had a large number of unlocks recently.

- The advantage of $OP lies in the super chain ecosystem formed by the $OP stack, which brings together a large number of excellent projects and capital sources. History shows that the price pumping force of $OP is stronger than that of ARB, which may be due to the priority of investment funds.

- $STRK is layer 2 of Zk core and the ecological and user recommendations are not as good as the previous two coins. However, its circulating market capitalization is lower than $ARB and $OP, and it has been trending down since its listing without a significant recovery

- $METIS was a hot topic a while ago. It experienced a major price drop after listing on Binance.

- $MANTA is a representative of Layer2 created according to the module model. The team works very hard, the projects in the ecosystem are growing very quickly, and the circulating market capitalization is only 400 million US dollars, the lowest of these.

Part 2 will be released soon

raw_text:
2. LSD
Main projects: $LDO, $SSV, $PRL

- The LSD protocol is mainly a node-related staking service that appeared after ETH upgraded from POW to POS (Proof of Stake). $LDO is the largest service provider, with the highest TVL across the network and a circulating market capitalization of $2 billion.

- SSV is an infrastructure configuration for distributed nodes, and its recent performance has been quite good.

3. DeFi
Main projects: $PENDLE, $UNI, $AAVE, $COMP, $CRV, $MKR

- DeFi is probably the most familiar to everyone. As the biggest area of innovation in the last bull market, DeFi adoption has spread to every aspect of daily life on-chain. Core players include $UNI, $AAVE, $COMP, $CRV, $MKR,... representing DEX (decentralized exchange), lending, stablecoin trading, stablecoin issuance,...

- As DeFi has become mature, this cycle is mainly based on previous upgrades and the level of innovation is not high enough. $PENDLE is a relatively innovative project that separates tokens into principal and interest for trading future profits. Pendle was also affected by the compound growth of TVL and coin price some time ago.

Part 3 will be released soon✅

raw_text:
4. Stablecoin based on ETH collateral
Main projects: $ENA, $LBR

- There are many ways to issue stablecoins. One of them is issuance with collateral, and the largest collateral is without a doubt $ETH. After LSD and Restaking, the project side will use collateral $ETH to gain profits from liquidity. 

- Such stablecoins have a natural rate of return. At the same time, the project side will conduct a number of token incentives, as well as dividends from minting and borrowing..., so the annual profit will be very significant.

- The famous LBR in 2023 is one of them. $ENA is also Binance's 2024 launchpool project. $ENA uses hedging derivative positions to maintain the value of collateral.

- Ena's TVL is as high as US$2.5 billion and its current outstanding market capitalization is already US$1.3 billion.

5. Restaking
Main projects: $REZ, $ETHFI

- Restaking is what I appreciate the most in this ETH round for two reasons:
New sectors: Market funds tend to speculate in new sectors.

- Small circulating market cap: ETHFI's market cap is $460 million and REZ's is $150 million.
Eigenlayer is the leader: The number of airdrops has been determined and the listing time is not far away.

✅Hopefully with the above information, you will understand more about the Ethereum ecosystem.😊

#Analytics

Bitcoin ETF flow is high but why is Bitcoin not increasing strongly❓

Capriole Investments founder Charles Edwards has three key factors that need to be confirmed to trigger a significant Bitcoin price rally:

- Increase buying from ETF funds: Track ETF flow at LINK

- Reduced selling from long-term investors: Selling from investors who have held Bitcoin for more than 2 years has a significant impact on the price. In 2024, these investors sold more, causing their Bitcoin holdings to drop to 54% over the past 6 months. This is equivalent to approximately 630,000 Bitcoins

- Increased liquidity in the US or globally: Increased liquidity in the US or globally could boost Bitcoin prices. For example, "There is still no Bitcoin spot ETF in the UK or Japan, two major markets"

Refer to the chart "Hodler's growth rate has dropped 3% since December 2023" - Charles Edwards.

raw_text:
#Trading Psychology

🔥How to Correctly Understand Alt Season – Expectations and Reality (Part 1)

Surely people always define "Alt Season" as Altcoins x 10-30-50-100, and consider this to be the guaranteed "standard" for altcoin season. This is also an extremely big misunderstanding of this concept.
In life nothing is certain, especially money, which is not easy to earn.
This has led to misunderstandings about "ALT SEASON".

When you achieve a profit of 2, 3, or 5 times, you have made a profit (if you choose to sell)... Is this not enough to prove that you have succeeded?

This is not enough in the minds of most retail investors

By definition Altcoin season is a period where Altcoins outperform Bitcoin, not a period where all altcoins must increase at least 10 times.
So stop predicting prices with big dreams.

raw_text:
#Trading Psychology

DID THE RECENT ADJUSTMENT teach you anything❓

Or are you still stuck in having too high expectations: "If only I had taken profit", "I knew this was going to happen but didn't do it"?

You keep creating reason after reason, and that's the way it is.

The only thing you can do is sit down and think about where you went wrong/right and improvise in the same way:

Question your investing practices, understand why you do/don't act, find flaws in your trading style, talk to people who are better at it.

It's also not the first time you've failed and it won't be your last. So please accept this.

- Invest smartly, maintain a realistic approach.
- Recover profits, preserve capital.
- Reinvest profits into high R/R opportunities.

🌟Essential Tips for Successful Futures Trading 🌟

1️⃣ Manage Trade Volume Wisely: Limit each trade to 10% of your account balance. For instance, with a $1000 account, each trade should be $100. This helps control risk and maintain stability.

2️⃣ Opt for ISOLATED Orders Only: Always use isolated orders to ensure losses are contained to individual trades, avoiding the broader impact of cross orders.

3️⃣ Take Profits Strategically: Secure profits when they reach 30-40-50%. If you wish to let the profit run, withdraw your initial capital and let the profit continue growing.

4️⃣ Transfer Profits to Spot Regularly: Move your profits back to your Spot account to safeguard your gains. Continue trading in Futures using only your original capital.

5️⃣ Capital Preservation is Key: The golden rule of futures trading is to protect your capital. Prioritize this above all to ensure long-term success.

✅ By following these tips, you can navigate the futures market with greater confidence and control, maximizing your potential for success while minimizing risks.

raw_text:
SUMMARY OF THE FED'S AUGUST 2024 DECISION

1. The Fed kept interest rates unchanged at 5.25% - 5.5%, the 8th consecutive time since the September 23 meeting

2. The Fed said inflation was approaching its target => Slightly more dovish than the June statement that inflation decline was still "modest"

3. However, the Fed reaffirmed that it would not cut interest rates until it was confident that inflation was at 2% => The tone was familiar, the Fed was still waiting for data to make a decision, not relying on a predetermined roadmap

4. The unemployment rate has increased but is still "low" => For the Fed, the labor market has cooled but is still not enough, the Fed wants to see unemployment rise further to curb inflation

The market has yet to see what the market expected, which is a hint of a rate cut in September, but the positive point The Fed has eased inflation concerns by shifting its tone to a more dovish tone.

4 major factors currently impacting to the crypto's supply and demand:

- Interest rates (set to decrease soon)
- The U.S. Presidential Election
- Global political tensions (escalating threats of war)
- The AI bubble

As for AI, it reminds me of the Metaverse trend that exploded in 2021. In reality, whether AI exists or not doesn't really matter. The most noteworthy thing here is that this could be the trend that draws in new participants and fuels FOMO-driven investments, but I don't have any high hopes for the technological potential or any extraordinary outcomes from "Artificial Intelligence."

At the core, the essence of finance—and crypto in particular—is the flow of money. 98-99% of crypto projects out there are just hype and speculation, with very few having real-world applications.

raw_text:
Pump and dump - Which you should know about altcoin bullruns

There are several typical type of traders in the market:

- Group 1: People who buy positions at the bottom but TP early -> Easy to re-enter high entries later

- Group 2: Traders buy low and sell high, repeat over and over -> Easy to become longterm holders

- Group 3: Waiting to buy but always miss the good entries and always waiting for low price areas to buy -> Almost all DCA on the side of the falling price

- Group 4: Bought but did not wait to close -> Hold to die until their portfolios back to negative PNL or even.

- Group 5: Buy and know how to close profit then delete the coin from Watchlist -> Small profit, big profit as long as it’s profit

All 5 groups are represented equally for users participating in the market.

Because no one can predict the bottom and the top, so there should be a specific plan

- Buy in which area, DCA in which area and close at what area.

Altcoin wave is all about pump and dump. It is also the way MM steals goods or dumps goods on users.

US job growth slows in August, hints at recession 👀

The US August jobs report showed job growth slowed, with just 142,000 new non-farm jobs created, lower than the 160,000 expected.

👨‍🌾 The unemployment rate fell slightly to 4.2%, as expected, and was the lowest since June, marking an improvement after four straight months of increases.

However, the report also showed a downward revision to the number of jobs created in the previous two months, with a total of 86,000 fewer than initially reported.

🔥 These signs of decline have raised concerns about the risk of an economic recession, sending stocks tumbling, with the S&P 500 down nearly 5%.

✍️ The weak job market could prompt the Federal Reserve (FED) to consider cutting interest rates, creating a positive signal for the cryptocurrency market, especially Bitcoin.

The market is not happy without Bang CZ 🫣

🚔 After completing his prison term at the end of September 2024, Changpeng Zhao (CZ) will not be able to return to run Binance, according to a settlement agreement with the US government.

Richard Teng is currently the CEO of Binance and CZ is banned from participating in the management of this exchange permanently, not just for three years as before.

🧐 This has many people questioning CZ's true influence in Binance's operations.

He still maintains a close relationship with key figures in the company such as Yi He and Tigran Gambaryan.

🚓 Binance's future depends on the company maintaining legal compliance. If CZ continues to keep his distance, Binance can avoid regulatory risks and maintain its market dominance.

raw_text:
Interest rate reduction ==> financial crisis

Recent interest rate reductions by the FED:

+1990-1992: interest rate from 8% reduced to 3% ==> stimulated credit injection into the recessionary economy.

+2000-2001: from 6.5% reduced to 1.75% ==> dot-com crisis.

+2006-2007: On September 18, 2007, the Federal Reserve #FED reduced interest rates from 5.25% to 4.75% (before that, they had maintained a very, very high interest rate for 14 consecutive months at 5.25% from June 2006 to August 2007)

Note:
-Interest rate reduction is when the crisis occurs, the severity or mildness will be adjusted by the central bank for a soft or hard landing.

- Lower interest rates to stimulate the economy ==> after stimulation there will be inflation ==> increase interest rates to control inflation ==> The cycle of the global economy.

After the current economic data release according to FEDWatchTool, investors predict a 63% chance of a 50 basis point rate cut and a 37% chance of a 25 basis point rate cut.

1. According to Arthur Hayes

👉 When interest rates gradually decrease, high-yield assets such as ETH staking (~ 4%) will become more attractive. Especially to fund and institutional investors, it will trigger a new bull run

4. The bright spot of the market is probably BTC eco. Prepare for BTC game in October with special reserve assets.

raw_text:
$BTC is about to enter the re-accumulation phase?

👉 In this phase, the price begins to stabilize and accumulate within a narrower range, creating the basis for the next price increase => Similar to the October cycle every year.

👉 2022-2023 is the transition of the accumulation cycle: This phase appears after a sharp price decline cycle. The price drops from 69k to 16k and then starts to increase.
👉 2023 is considered the accumulation phase that peaks in the distribution cycle in 2024.

👉 When entering the re-accumulation phase, weak hands will leave the market, while smart money will quietly buy at a good price, absorbing the selling pressure from weak hands

👉 The FED's 0.5% interest rate cut is the biggest supportive news for $BTC, moreover, the actual value of $BTC is increasing steadily, reaching $31,720 (Actual value is the average cost of all $BTC purchases) => Most $BTC investors are profitable.

👉 This price range needs to find strong support to continue to strengthen the uptrend of $BTC

raw_text:
$BTC during the period of price decline or not increasing as expected, investors holding long positions are forced to sell to avoid more losses, leading to liquidation.

👉 This causes the number of buy contracts to decrease sharply, reducing selling pressure in the market.

👉 On October 1, more than 4,000 $BTC was liquidated in long positions, this is the 2nd largest liquidation event of the year.

👉 Normally, large liquidations will lead to maintaining the current range in the short term, but it is necessary to monitor the buying power to be able to recover after the decline.

This period of stagnation is also quite suitable for technical analysis, at least the selling pressure has decreased

$BTC ANALYSIS WEEK 2 OF OCTOBER

-Currently, the liquidity zone of $BTC at 63Kxx is the largest with 1B$ USD to be liquidated around this area.

-The increase in $BTC price last night came from spot buying on most major exchanges such as #Binance, #Coinbase, #OKX, signaling a healthy growth.

- It is worth noting that OI has returned to growth last night, the decrease in OI in the first days of the month is one of the reasons for $BTC's strong correction.

Coinwire sees another bullish signal

👉 Short term holders (STH) start buying $BTC again in a state of increasing FOMO (green)

👉 Long term holders (LTH) on the other hand are starting to sell (orange). This action reinforces that $BTC price will start a strong bullish wave.

👉 This chart repeats the same action. Price increases -> LTH gradually sell -> STH buy FOMO

👉 % of BTC supply held by STH increases as price increases
👉 % of BTC supply held by STH decreases as price decreases
👉 STH buy and sell following the trend

👉 They buy when the price increases because of greed -> FOMO. They sell when the price decreases because of fear -> cut losses

👉 LTH simply do the opposite. So it is useful to follow this chart. Look at it to make the opposite action to STH

raw_text:
For the first time in history, gold has climbed to the second position in the asset collection of global central banks

👉 Of course, central banks must prioritize holding fiat to make payments and regulate the economy, but the increase in gold holdings shows a new trend of central banks.

👉At the end of 2023, gold accounted for 17.6% of central banks' reserves, the current figure is certainly higher because Russia and China continue to buy in record volumes.

👉It is worth noting that this second position has been maintained by the Euro since World War II.

👉 The world's official gold reserves have now reached their highest level since the 1970s, at about 1,170 million ounces, far exceeding the time when President Nixon declared the end of the gold standard (in 1971).

👉Since then, the value of the USD has plummeted, the USD has lost 98.5% of its value against gold in 53 years, the Euro has lost 98.3%, the Japanese Yen has lost 96.7%, and the Swiss Franc has lost 93.4%.

4️⃣ $W has better cross-chain product & volume, as the 1st in their narrative.

Therefore, in conclusion:

1. $W is good for long-term
2. $ZRO is good for short-term

What do you think, which coin is better in interoperability narrative?

raw_text:
🔴 The Reason Made Market Crashed Today - The Ongoing Trade War is Having Significant Implications

US President Donald Trump's new tariff rates will impact the U.S. trade value by up to $1.3 trillion. The U.S. stock market has already lost over $1.5 trillion in market capitalization, as approximately 43% of the total imports into the U.S. will soon be subject to tariffs.

What does this mean? Let's break it down 👇

- President Trump has announced new tariffs: 25% on goods from Canada, 25% on goods from Mexico, and 10% on goods from China. These tariffs are built on existing tariffs on China, some of which stem from Trump's most recent trade war.

- Starting at 12:01 AM Eastern Time on February 4, these tariffs will come into effect.

=> In simple terms, goods worth $100 imported into the U.S. from Canada or Mexico will now cost $125.

In 2023, the U.S. imported $910 billion worth of goods from Canada and Mexico. Many of these goods will see a 25% higher import cost.

Around 40% of all U.S. imports come from China, Canada, and Mexico. Some specific goods will be affected more significantly.

👉For example:  The total value of the auto industry’s imports from Canada and Mexico is $80 billion annually. Additionally, the U.S. imports $97 billion in crude oil from Canada each year and $55 billion in phones from China.

The 25% tariff on Canada and Mexico will increase costs for U.S. automakers, adding $3,000 to the price of some of the 16 million vehicles sold in the U.S. annually.

Food prices will also rise 🔺, as Mexico supplies over 60% of fresh produce to the U.S.

In general, the U.S. is less dependent on trade compared to its allies. For example, trade in goods and services makes up about 85% of Germany’s GDP and around 65% of the UK’s GDP. In contrast, trade in goods and services affects less than 30% of the U.S. GDP. This gives #Trump a "competitive edge."

These tariffs will have a significant impact on Canada and Mexico, in particular. Imports from Canada and Mexico account for about 14% and 15%, respectively, of total U.S. imports, but these countries rely heavily on the U.S. market, with trade to the U.S. representing nearly 80% of their exports.

Clearly, the trade balance is skewed.

Interestingly, China has significantly reduced its reliance on U.S. trade since 2005. Exports to the U.S. now make up only 15% of China’s total annual exports, and these goods represent just 15% of U.S. imports.

A historic victory for Ripple and the price of XRP has surged during this time to $2.6. XRP is a coin that has maintained its price during this period and may soon return to its previous ATH price

Last night's #Hyperliquid event highlighted the fragility of seemingly optimal protocols and other concerns 🔥

#Binance #OKX listed futures as #Hyperliquid faced liquidation. Is this different from large exchanges intentionally harming smaller ones? Was it targeted?

#Hyperliquid 's fairness is questioned after closing $JELLY and forcing low-price settlement (0.0095 USD vs. ~0.50 USD oracle) to limit losses, setting a risky precedent and damaging user trust.

#Hyperliquid increasingly resembles a CEX without KYC/AML, creating significant legal risks. Recent hacking/money laundering cases are concerning.

Risky product designs (mixed vaults, no position limits) on #Hyperliquid enable market manipulation and expose users to systemic risk.

The situation bears watching. What are your thoughts?

raw_text:
How will the tariffs that the US is about to impose on April 2 affect the market? 🔥

Currently, in this 88k area, team is seeing it as more of a bull trap and the trading volume is still low.

=> Smart money has not yet flowed in => this uptrend is not sustainable

Funding ratio turns negative, stablecoin lending rate decreases => risk of fleeing high-risk assets

- Long-term holders refuse to sell, creating potential pressure when the market fluctuates strongly.

If tariffs push the US economy into recession => It is likely that $BTC and crypto will also adjust strongly.

If there is "unexpected" news about monetary policy (such as the #FED intervening or countries making trade concessions), it can create a strong recovery momentum.

Observe the on-chain #stablecoin volume: if it increases sharply, it may be a signal that capital is about to return.

=> In general, short-term volatility is like that, but in the long term, if the trade war reshapes the economic landscape, the recovery will benefit #Crypto.

On March 28, the crypto market witnessed the largest options expiry of Q1, with a total value of:
- $12.1 billion in $BTC
- $2.15 billion in $ETH

Max-Pain Effect & Pre-Expiry Correction 
Typically, before options expire, $BTC & $ETH prices tend to gravitate toward the Max-Pain level—the price that causes the greatest losses for option holders.

 Max-Pain levels for this expiry:
- $BTC: $85,000
- $ETH: $2,400

As expected, $BTC dropped to the 85K zone just before expiry, triggering a broader market correction. This was the key reason behind $BTC & $ETH’s midday decline today.

Miners Sell Biggest Since April: 16,000 BTC Miners Unloaded in One Day

🔥 As BTC crossed $123K, miners started to sell: Over 16,000 BTC were pushed to exchanges in one day - marking the largest dump since April 7. Miners' BTC reserves dropped to $65,000 BTC, the lowest in a month, indicating timing.

🔥Whales also took advantage of the opportunity to sell: BTC transferred to exchanges on the day reached 81,000 $BTC, with large addresses alone accounting for 58,000 BTC. Estimated total realized profit on the day reached $3.5B:

➕ Long-term holders (LTH): ~56%, nearly $2B.

➕ Short-term holders (STH): ~44%, about $1.5B.

🔥 The price has corrected to $118K, the market has not reacted negatively - this is the transition phase, when $BTC is transferred from "no longer hopeful" investors to "still hopeful" investors.

When miners and whales take profits, CEXs start to dry up, OTC liquidity decreases, funding is tilted towards short. In the coming period, all attention from BTC will probably shift to ETH.

- Stop-losses (SL) will be set wider, reducing unnecessary SL hits to reduce the stresses you might get.

🚨  Major Event Alert: Powell Speech at Jackson Hole at 10AM ET today

Markets have been dumping all week because traders expect Powell to sound hawkish, which already pushed September rate cut odds down to 71%.

But here’s the part most people miss: Since the last FOMC, the jobs market has weakened. Unemployment jumped to 4.2%, jobless claims are rising, revisions are negative, and bankruptcies just hit the highest since 2020, all while inflation stays under 3%.

That means Powell may not be as hawkish as feared. If he hints at a future rate cut, it could trigger a massive short squeeze. If he stays hawkish, downside is limited since it’s already priced in.

Either way, BTC and alts have room to rally in the coming weeks. Our vision is still longterm bullish for the market, despite there might be shakeouts before the real pump.

⚠️ Alert: Lower your position sizes or take profit now before the speech to secure your portfolio. If the market pumps, we will call for new signals, no need to be FOMO.

raw_text:
Don’t focus too much on short-term price swings right after the FED’s announcement. This is a highly volatile period, especially with the press conference coming up in the next 30 minutes. The market always finds reasons to move sharply up or down in response to FED news, based on short-term expectations. A clearer market view on the rate decision usually emerges after about 24 hours.

In this case, the 0.25% rate cut, along with the outlook for two more cuts this year, has already been priced in. Meanwhile, the “dot plot” for next year only suggests one or two cuts, which is lower than what the market was hoping for.

That said, don’t get overly caught up in the short-term reaction. What truly matters is that the FED has finally delivered its first rate cut in a year. This marks a meaningful shift from a “hold” stance toward an easing bias, a much more important signal, and one that is supportive for the market over the longer term.

raw_text:
Some people are thinking our view for the crash is normal?

Then read this story, RIP Konstantin  Ganich👇

🔥 Major Ukrainian Crypto Investor Dies by Suicide in Kyiv Amid Market Crash

In Kyiv, one of Ukraine’s most well-known cryptocurrency entrepreneurs, Konstantin Ganich, 32, also known as Kostya Kudo, was found dead. His body was discovered at night in the Obolon district, inside his own Lamborghini Urus, along with his licensed personal firearms.

The day before, the businessman had complained to relatives about depression and financial difficulties.

Ganich’s death coincided with yet another global financial market crash — stocks of major companies and cryptocurrencies plummeted sharply. In just one night, the U.S. stock market lost $1.65 trillion, and the crypto market suffered a record $20B loss.

Ganich was the head of the “Ukrainian Traders Association” and owned the only Ferrari 296 GTB in the country, worth 15 million hryvnias.

$BTC Analysis

You can see that the MM is trying to redraw the chart to attract more liquidity. This chart is getting the healthy appearance back, ngl 😂

However, there is no HH (Higher High) being formed yet until the close time of today. You can easily compare how $BTC reacts at the last drop, looks so familiar, right?

A funny thing in any financial market is that, you must choose your own decision to predict anything at the point it can happen in both ways. So looking at this chart, some will tell the last drop is pure market manipulation, and it will pump to new ATH just like how $75k zone did last time. The rest will say the opposite, as a dead cat bounce, and it will dump to 75k.

I'm with the second team, I think it's very risky to enter a big trade just for a recovery wave. Main coins will keep bleeding, and only shitcoins like AI-related Binance Alpha coins will pump for the exit.

Why only shitcoins on alpha? Because most of other big coins have already done the distribution phase, you can look at $NIL or $SAHARA recently, accumulation to dump their bags then remove their liquidity. Meanwhile, shitcoin team just paid a bunch of money to list on Binance alpha, and they will need an exit to recover their investments & get profit before the end of the market.

If you are still positive about the main market, look outside, everything has reached ATH, which means we are near the distribution phase than pump wave omo.

If you still want to do spot, do shitcoins, and make sure you always have SL. In case of any sudden drops, try to have market SL, don't set limit SL, otherwise your SL might not hit in some rare cases.

For any newcomers here, my suggestion for public signals ⤵️

- You don't have to wait to hit TP to close a portion/full position, as long as you have 1R in profit (estimated loss if SL hits = 1R), you can close 50% or full, based on your greed (Close 50% and leave SL the same is a useful way to avoid being BE swept)
- In the sideways market, try to protect capital at all costs. We would rather be late and safe than early and lost
- Protect your capital well - only people who can manage the risk well can be the last survivors, most will just gamble and leave when the account is liquidated

You will learn more tips and knowledge in the private group, but I'm sharing some crucial ones for ya, you will need that.

Good luck, players! 🍾

1️⃣ Top Coins - Futures Signal

- Target: Safer bet with less manipulation
- Trader type: Who wants to have fewer risks & times of getting SL, also skin in the game with market movement with top coins
- Risk:Reward (R:R) ratio: 1:2 to 1:3, focusing on getting full TPs in short range
- Leverage: 
+ As top coins move quite small, therefore we will need to increase the leverage so our position can have estimated loss & profit the same as you play shitcoins. 
+ Recommend: x20-x50, and make sure you can see the estimated loss with your total volume at 2-3% of your total futures balance
- Risk per trade: 2-3% max per trade
+ Example: You set a $BTC Long, and when you type TP & SL, you can see your estimated loss if SL hits is 100$. Your futures balance is 1,000$, so it's a 10% risk for this trade. 
+ To set 2%, you need to lower your current volume 5 times more, so the estimated loss is 20$ (2% risk of $1,000)

2️⃣ Risk Coins - Futures Signal

- Target: Riskier position to have a bigger profit than top coin signals
- Trader type: Who is willing to risk more funds (more times of getting SL) due to pure manipulation from the dev team to earn a big profit
- Risk:Reward (R:R) ratio: From 1:4 to infinity
- Leverage:
+ Default: 10x
+ In setting a futures position, we just need to choose the proper volume (volume = margin * leverage) so we can see the estimated loss/profit acceptable with our risk management strategy (1% risk per trade). 
- Risk per trade: 1% max per trade
+ Example: You set a $BTC Long, and when you type TP & SL, you can see your estimated loss if SL hits is 100$. Your futures balance is 1,000$, so it's a 10% risk for this trade. 
+ To set 1%, you need to lower your current volume 10 times more, so the estimated loss is 10$ (1% risk of $1,000)

3️⃣ Spot Signal

- Target: Long-term holding for main portfolio, as normally, people will just allocate 20-30% of their total portfolio to trade futures, the rest is to hold spot
- Trader type: 
+ People who can not control their greed in futures & want to have a big upgrade in portfolio value after each season
+ People want to trade but don't want to get SL quick
- Risk:Reward (R:R) ratio: 1:2 to 1:4
- Risk per position: You must have a stop loss zone (by using stop-limit order type in spot to set SL) with each position you hold. A slow rug market will drain your portfolio if you don't have any SLs in spot. Normally, people will target 30% drop or 60%.

raw_text:
ℹ️ What is R?

R comes from the Risk/Reward Ratio. It represents the amount you are willing to risk on a single trade.

You set a Risk/Reward ratio of 1/2, which means ➡️ You risk 1R to potentially earn 2R.

Let’s look at a simple example ⤵️

You open a long position on BTC and set your Stop Loss (SL) and Take Profit (TP) at a 1/2 ratio.

If the SL is hit → You lose 1R
👉 If the loss equals $100, then 1R = $100

If the TP is hit → You gain 2R
👉 2R = 2 × $100 = $200

The monetary value of 1R is defined by you. By controlling your R, you control your risk, trade smart and stay disciplined.

raw_text:
Damn looks like a lot of people are newbies. Ok, I will explain about R in details.

1️⃣ What is "R"?
Simply put, 1R is your Unit of Risk. It is the maximum amount of money you are willing to lose on a single trade.

- If you decide that you are okay with losing $10 on a trade, then 1R = $10.
- If you decide that you are okay with losing $100 on a trade, then 1R = $100.

When a trader says, "I made 3R on that Bitcoin trade," they mean they made 3 times the amount they risked.

In the 1st picture, you can see I'm doing a TP/SL setup for a long position on BTC.

I enter the stop loss (SL) price in the configuration windows, and Bitget shows me the estimated loss if this signal hits SL ~ 37$.

➡️ 1R = 37$

2️⃣ Why does it must be 1R for the estimated loss?

We want that to keep it simple

- R = Unit of Risk 
- Every amount of estimated loss of 1 single trade = 1R

You will decide how much you want to risk for a single trade. Simply by putting the price of SL, you will see the estimated loss. That's your 1R, even if it's 37$ or 3700$, still an amount to lose if the trade gets stopped with SL triggered.

3️⃣ Profit +2R, what does it mean?

You can see in the 2nd picture, I enter a TP price, it shows estimated profit 60$.

At the same time, I edit the estimated loss to $30.

So you can clearly see that:
- 1R = 30$
- The estimated profit is double the estimated loss ($60 to $30)

First, you need to understand what these numbers mean.
- SL: If this position doesn't go to the price you want, and at some moments, it will hit your SL (Stop loss) => You lose 30$ (1R)
- TP: If this position goes to the price you want, and at some moments, it will hit your TP (Take profit) => You win 60$

So obviously you will earn 60$ if this hits your take profit point, and your position will close => Your balance +60$

➡️ By setting up TP/SL, you are making a configuration: Risk 30$ (1R - If this hits SL), to earn 60$ (2 times the risk - If this hits TP)

➡️➡️ 60$ = 2 * 30$ => Your profit is 2R (2 * 30$)

That's how you put a Risk/Reward ratio on a single trade. You can not keep trying to close manually all the time, only if you know what you're doing. 

Most of the newbies getting liquidated for that reason - They don't care about Risk/Reward ratio for a long run, only care about the number running on the screen to get dopamine of doing gambles.

- You need an entry point to exit if the market turns opposite to what you think (SL)
- You need an entry point to exit if you have good profit (TP)

This is the first explanation, so tell me if you understand:
- Reacts 👍 if you understand my point about R & Risk/Reward ratio
- Reacts 😡 if you don't understand anything

raw_text:
A few words for you guys - my beloved public community. If you can see we're keeping open new position on a position that hits SL before, here are some advices to survive during in a sideways market

From yesterday, we're back in the SL hunting season AGAIN after a strong downtrend days ago. You can understand the reason of this hunting season in a nutshell like this, like why does it keep happening after a strong trend (up or down) ⤵️
- Strong trends = 1 side liquidity
- 1 side liquidity = Imbalance liquidity
- Imbalance liquidity = Orders can not be filled 
- Orders can not be filled = Market collapses
- Market in order not to collapse = Liquidity must go back to the neutral point to adapt the liquidity needed for both sides to be able to open a position
- Liquidity goes back to the neutral point = Sideways market
- Sideways market = Low liquidity
- Low liquidity = MM hunting SL to create liquidity (a SL is also a filled order)
- MM hunting SL to create liquidity = Traders afraid to trade
- Traders afraid to trade = Lower the interest to trade, lower the income of MM
- Lower the interest to trade, lower the income of MM = MM has to push the liquidity stronger 
- MM has to push the liquidity stronger = A clear trend market is back (uptrend/downtrend)
- A clear trend market is back = Retails & whales are back in trading

Repeat this cycle again and again, congratulation, you just create a functioning crypto market  ✔️ 

TL;DR
1. Sideways market = Lack of liquidity
2. Lack of liquidity = SL hunts
3. SL hunts = Positions at much higher risks for a TP
4. Protect your capital (skip trading/use low volume) when trading in a sideways market
5. If you survive in a sideways market, you will earn a lot of profit in a clear trend market. The loss during a sideways market is just a cost to run this trading business - Every business always needs to pay for a cost to function, right?

➡️ In conclusion, although I keep repeating over and over about how to control the risk, how to control the capital, how this market works, some people are gonna mess up with their portfolios without reading a single word from my guides.

Just don't be that guy, and try to know what you're doing before investing heavily in such a volatile market like cryptocurrency.

⚠️ If you can see people going nuts because GOLD x2 x3 in 2 years, SILVER x3 in 1 year, imagine how volatile this crypto field can be, right? That's why I keep insisting on controlling the risk, which is the 1st priority in every investment field, not just focusing only on how much profit you can make, especially in this cryptocurrency.

Good luck fellas, wish you guys all the best in this journey. No matter what happens, CryptoNinjas Trading 🥷🏿 will always be here, staying right next to you, even when you lose, win or tie. We are a family for a reason. 🤝

raw_text:
Bitcoin Analysis

In theory, as you can see in the chart, we're definitely going into a bear market in 2026

Like I stated before in the previous analysis, the main keyword of 2026 is WAR. That's why safety assets like GOLD, SILVER are having their strongest uptrend and pace in their whole history

As a result, risk assets like $BTC is being affected. That's why every pump is just a Technical Analysis (TA) recovery to acquire more liquidity, as a token can not keep dumping without recovering due to lack of liquidity to fill orders - Explains about this here.

You can see in the chart, with TA, the next support zone is around 60k (the latest wick), while the main support zone will be around 50-52k ~60% from the top. Compared to the last cycle, I think this drop will be suitable for the current situation, especially when $BTC has received mass adoption from the world with ETFs & institutional investments.

So in conclusion, the main trend is still SHORT 🔴. More pump = better entry to short. If you aim for long, aim for a short recovery only. 

My bet for the bottom of the 2026 bear market is 50-52, with a wick around 46-49. 

However, don't ever predict top & bot to start buying or selling. Always do DCA because we are not GOD, we can not predict the future - We are investors, we analyze and make an investment plan following it, control risk, and are flexible with different market situations.
